title: PARENTING EDUCATION GROUPS - 211info
text: LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NORTHWEST YAMHILL COUNTY PARENTING EDUCATION GROUPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides parenting skills classes that help caregivers connect with one another, offers evidence-based parenting strategies, and interactive time with children to directly apply learning. Most classes are 6-8 weeks long. Snacks and child care are included for in-person participants. Classes are available both online and in-person. 435 NE Evans Street Suite A McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Parents, relatives, and caregivers of children ages 0-17 Hours: Varies by class Email (503) 433-6156 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 433-6156 AFP Program Director DawnDee Walraven [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Yamhill County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-5pm, Friday 8:30am-4pm Services: Parenting Skills Classes Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - COLLABORATIVE HOME SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES OREGON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SAFE FAMILIES FOR CHILDREN LEGAL SERVICES - SAFE ROUTE IMMIGRATION MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NW MCMINNVILLE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
